## Source: ossf-package-analysis (060f3ebfeb0862be79294c75a97aaa823e0378ae4ef10ce1910472c923b31dc3)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-git_src_migrator-monolith' @ 1.6.3 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
